batch_summary: While reassuring her mother on the phone that her apartment is safe, Rachel is startled when a pigeon flies through her window. After a tense struggle, she successfully traps the bird under a pot. Her victory is short-lived when a man named Duncan enters looking for Phoebe, revealing himself to be Phoebe's husband. Shocked by this revelation, Rachel drops the pot, letting the pigeon escape. Later, the group confronts Phoebe about her secret marriage, which she downplays.

When Rachel offers to take a message, Duncan casually reveals that he is Phoebe's husband. Stunned by this shocking news, Rachel drops the pot, allowing the pigeon to escape. The scene then shifts to the rest of the group confronting Phoebe about her secret marriage. Phoebe tries to downplay the situation, cryptically explaining that she is not "married married," leaving her friends bewildered.

Furious at Chandler for leaking this, Monica retaliates by exposing Chandler's secret: he has a third nipple.
